scripts.dev: export NODE_ENV=development && pnpm run build && pnpm run start
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @workspace/db build && pnpm --filter @workspace/api-zod build && tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit
scripts.test:contoso: pnpm --filter @workspace/db build && pnpm --filter @workspace/api-zod build && tsc -p tsconfig.json && node ./scripts/run-contoso-test.mjs
scripts.test:platform-boundaries: pnpm --filter @workspace/db build && pnpm --filter @workspace/api-zod build && tsc -p tsconfig.json && node ./scripts/run-platform-boundary-tests.mjs
scripts.test:graph-discovery: pnpm --filter @workspace/db build && pnpm --filter @workspace/api-zod build && tsc -p tsconfig.json && pnpm run verify:dist-exports && node ./scripts/run-pattern-tests.mjs -- operational-graph-discovery.test.ts && node ./scripts/run-pattern-tests.mjs -- discover-phase-adapter.test.ts
scripts.test:operationalization: pnpm --filter @workspace/db build && pnpm --filter @workspace/api-zod build && tsc -p tsconfig.json && node ./scripts/run-operationalization-test.mjs
